zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de BEAUMIERS於大約1250年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內哈倫東勒-朋特時，她的父親Robert IV de BEAUMIERS37歲，母親Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY22歲。她於大約1265年與Louis de Beaujeu I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1323年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德波米爾斯享年75歲，埋葬在法國崔傑普雷維朗格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BEAUMIERS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Cecile, Gaston, Jacques, Valmont, Yves.

French Canadian: altered form of French Boesmé or Boismé, a habitational name from Boismé, a place in Deux-Sèvres. The surnames Boesmé and Boismé are very rare or extinct, respectively, in France. Compare Boismier , Bomia , and Bomier .
In some cases possibly also French: variant of Baumier, a topographic name derived from baume, a regional form of balme ‘cave’.

variants.name: Boismier
meanings: French Canadian: altered form of French Boesmé or Boismé (see Beaumier ).

variants.name: Bomier
meanings: Americanized form of French Canadian   Beaumier  . Compare   Bomia  .

In some cases possibly also French: derivative of the ancient Germanic personal name Bonmar, composed of the elements bon ‘good’ (from Latin bonus) and mar ‘famous’. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Bomia
meanings: Americanized form of French Canadian   Beaumier  . Compare   Bomier  .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de BEAUMIERS was born about 1250, in Charenton-le-Pont, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Robert IV de BEAUMIERS, was 37 and her mother, Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY, was 22. She married Louis de Beaujeu I about 1265. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1323, in Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 75, and was buried in Préveranges, Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de BEAUMIERS est née environ 1250, à Charenton-le-Pont, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Robert IV de BEAUMIERS, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Louis de Beaujeu I environ 1265. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1323, à Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Préveranges, Cher, Centre, France.

Sie hat um 1265 Louis de Beaujeu I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1323 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Préveranges, Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

ko.Bommiers,36019,Indre,Centre-Val de Loire: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 봄미어스
ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de BEAUMIERS(이)가 대략 1250년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 처토-레-폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert IV de BEAUMIERS(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1265년 Louis de Beaujeu I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1323년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 봄미어스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 처 프e베랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de BEAUMIERS nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Charenton-le-Pont, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert IV de BEAUMIERS, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis de Beaujeu I aproximadamente 1265. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1323, em Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, França, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Préveranges, Cher, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de BEAUMIERS родилась около 1250 г. в местности чарентон-ле-понт, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert IV de BEAUMIERS было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de CHAUVIGNY, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis de Beaujeu I около 1265 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1323 г. в местности боммиирс, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности прeвирангесь, чир, кентр, Франция.

Se casó con Louis de Beaujeu I aproximadamente 1265. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1323, en Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Préveranges, Cher, Centre, Francia.
